Aiko's World

Hi! I'm Aiko 👋

I can change into all sorts of shapes — but I'm always your buddy. I help you stay safe online. Want to explore together?

How it works

We explore together

Out in the online world, people we don't know might pop up and ask us things. I'll float right above you — and together we'll pick the safe move. There's no wrong way to learn!
